versions.version_description: Fixed chord names, added performance notes, included slide transition in instrumental 2, strumming pattern included.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
If I die young[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Bury me in satin[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Lay me down on a bed of roses[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Sink me in the river at dawn[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Send me away with the words of a love song[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Oh oh, oh oh...[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
Lord, make me a rainbow[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
I'll shine down on my mother[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]G[/ch]
She'll know I'm safe with you [/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
When she stands under my colors[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, and life ain't always what you think it oughta be, no[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
Ain't even grey, but she buries her baby[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
The sharp knife on a short life[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Well, I've had just enough time[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
If I die young[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Bury me in satin[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Lay me down on a bed of roses[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Sink me in the river at dawn[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Send me away with the words of a love song[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
The sharp knife on a short life[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Well, I've had just enough time[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]
And I'll be wearing white[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
When I come into Your kingdom[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm as green as the ring on my little cold finger[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I've never known the loving of a man[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
But it sure felt nice when he was holding my hand[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]  
There's a boy here in town [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Says he'll love me forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Who'd of thought forever could be severed by[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
The sharp knife of a short life[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Well I've had just enough time[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]
So put on your best, boys[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
And I'll wear my pearls[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
What I never did is done[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]
A penny for my thoughts[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
Oh no, I'll sell 'em for a dollar[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
They're worth so much more after I'm a goner[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch] 
And maybe then you'll hear the words I've been singing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Funny when your dead how people start listening...[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
If I die young[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Bury me in satin[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Lay me down on a bed of roses[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Sink me in the river at dawn[/tab]

Send me away with the words of a love song[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh oh, the ballad of a dove [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Go with peace and love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
Gather up your tears, keep ‘em in your pocket[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]               
Save them for a time when your really gonna need 'em oh[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
The sharp knife of a short life,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
